As long as the Earth, Moon and Sun exists, there will be hope." Final Scene. "YOU LIED TO ME MOTHER! ALL THIS SHIT IS FUCKING SHIT AND I'VE JUST CHOKED THE SHIT OUT OF Asuka AND-- AND-- SHIT!!!!"

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Mon Jan 04, 2010 6:33 am Yui: Shinji. Have you remembered everything what I just said to you? Shinji. Yes, mother. Instrumentality is a false illusion and false happiness. I have to get used that human relationships are painful, and so is real life. Yui: Well, fuck that! I'm just a mirage by the Instrumentality. Your mother's dead! Seele won! Shinji: AAAAAAHHHHHHH! (The camera shows Shinji screaming as he descends towards lunacy. Then, we see the GNR with all human souls instrumentalised. The surrounding area hints million years have passed. The movie reel snaps, and Anno appears, making funny faces towards the

Article: What if EVA had a twist ending
 shows Shinji screaming as he descends towards lunacy. Then, we see the GNR with all human souls instrumentalised. The surrounding area hints million years have passed. The movie reel snaps, and Anno appears, making funny faces towards the viewers. Pen Pen gawks. The end.)

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Mon Jan 04, 2010 10:02 am After Shinji stops choking Asuka, the whole cast of the show comes around a corner apparently alive. They then point and laugh at them both saying things like,"We got you good!" and ,"You sure fell for it!". The backdrop is lifted and it is revealed to be a set with more people pointing and laughing. Gendo and even Rei point and laugh. Shinji and Asuka struggle to understand then Kaji, Ritsuko and Misato appear with fake bullet wounds and also point and laugh. Shinji is stunned when his mother appears. Shinji stares for a second, then Yui points and laughs as well. Even Asuka's mother appears and laughs too. It is then revealed that the whole show was a giant prank. SEELE's true purpose is really to pull the ultimate prank to be made on video. The Angels are super-realistic special affects and all the death and destruction in the whole in the show are staged. Yui's "death" and Gendo's shunning of Shinji over the years were part of the show. All the people that "died" during 2nd Impact were really tuned in to their TVs to watch the greatest prank in human history. Shinji and Asuka stare at each other for a few seconds, then promptly flip off the cast. Shinji then says,"You're so fucked up..."

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Mon Jan 04, 2010 10:04 am @Allemann: Brilliant! Allemann wrote: (The camera shows Shinji screaming as he descends towards lunacy. Then, we see the GNR with all human souls instrumentalised. The surrounding area hints million years have passed. The movie reel snaps, and Anno appears, laughing maniacally into the camera. "In the Year 2525" fades in as Anno's twisted & demonic face blurs into blackness, credits begin to roll as Zager & Evans plod their monotonous tune into oblivion. End.)

Article: What if EVA had a twist ending
2525" fades in as Anno's twisted & demonic face blurs into blackness, credits begin to roll as Zager & Evans plod their monotonous tune into oblivion. End.)

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Mon Jan 04, 2010 10:55 am Twist ending #2 After Asuka's last line, the audience sees Mega Tokyo-3 all intact. A helicopter flies by, large reflectors illuminate the late night. Several streets are amber from the blood. Ritsuko's plan to kill Leliel with throwing the remaining N2 bombs is a success. Like a mangled beetle, Eva-01 is in the middle of the puddle among Leliel's remains. Several NERV personnel lead by Ritsuko approach Eva-01. They open the hatch and find Shinji. They can only determine his death. Back in NERV, they study the black box to reconstruct what happened in the last ten hours. They establish Shinji died do to oxygen deprivation and radioactive LCL his internal organs drank like a sponge. He was dying for this ten hours. His body didn't want to give up. Everything goes black and EoE's credits star to roll. Ending's symbolism: The ten hours represent the last ten episodes. Then last episodes only happen in Shinji's oxygen-deprived brain. His mind concocts it because of Shinji's guilt that if he dies NERV will never be able to defeat the Angels. In the last episode, the Instrumentality part is actually a guilt driven Shinji accepting death (Which is understandable. By that point, his brain is ravaged, so his hallucinations become bizarre.) The place where he ends up with Asuka is hell. Asuka share the residence with Shinji because she died when she neutralized Leliel's A.T. field with Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Mon Jan 04, 2010 10:57 am The prefect twist ending... After Third Impact, everyone comes out of the sea of LCL, and they look at each other, then look at Shinji.....and then......they pull of their faces to reveal that everyone in Eva is really.............BILL COSBY!
